samples.original: سأغادر الإمارات الشهر القادم. لا يصلني رمز التحقق.
samples.translation: I'm leaving the Emirates next month. I don't get the check code.

samples.original: كيف أغلق حساب الراتب الخاص بي. سأغادر الإمارات الشهر القادم.
samples.translation: I'm leaving the Emirates next month.

samples.original: أحتاج تحويل أموالي إلى الخارج. مجرد استفسار.
samples.translation: I need to transfer my money out.

samples.original: كيف أحدث الهوية الإماراتية. نحن ننتقل نهائيا.
نحن ننتقل نهائيا. أريد إيقاف بطاقتي المفقودة.
samples.translation: I want to stop my missing card.

samples.original: هذه الرسوم غير عادلة. أنا محبط جدا من الخدمة.
samples.translation: These fees are unfair. I'm very disappointed in the service.

samples.original: mera card foreign mein decline ho gaya. main service se pareshan hoon.
samples.translation: mera card foreign mein decline ho gaya. main service se pareshan hoon.

samples.original: app baar baar crash ho raha hai. main service se pareshan hoon.
samples.translation: app baar baar crash ho raha hai. main service se pareshan hoon.

samples.original: main service se pareshan hoon. salary account kaise band hoga.
samples.translation: main service se pareshan hoon. salary account kaise band hoga.

samples.original: main agle mahine UAE chhod raha hoon. mujhe apne paise India bhejne hain.
samples.translation: main agle mahine UAE chhod raha hoon. mujhe apne paise India bhejne hain.

samples.original: dhanyavaad. app baar baar crash ho raha hai.
samples.translation: dhanyavaad. app baar baar crash ho raha hai.

samples.original: bas pooch raha tha. mera card foreign mein decline ho gaya.
samples.translation: bas pooch raha tha. mera card foreign mein decline ho gaya.

samples.original: dismayado ako sa serbisyo. na-decline ang card ko sa abroad.
samples.translation: I'm dismayed by the service. declining my card or going abroad.

samples.original: kailangan kong ipadala ang pera ko sa Pilipinas. nagtatanong lang po.
samples.translation: I need to send money to the Philippines.

samples.original: laging nagko-crash ang app. dismayado ako sa serbisyo.
samples.translation: Always a crash app. dismayed by the service.

samples.original: paano isara ang aking account. nagtatanong lang po.
samples.translation: How to get rid of my account.

samples.original: lilipat na kami nang tuluyan. bakit may bayad na ganito.
samples.translation: I'm not a big fan of the movie, so why pay for it?

samples.original: kailangan kong ipadala ang pera ko sa Pilipinas. nagtatanong lang po.
samples.translation: I need to send money to the Philippines.

finding: Arabic (opus-mt-ar-en) translates faithfully. Tagalog (NLLB) is usable. ROMANISED HINDI is NOT translatable by opus-mt-hi-en (it expects Devanagari) and is therefore left untranslated on purpose — the char-ngram classifier and romanised keyword entities handle it. This is a documented multilingual limitation, not a silent mistranslation.
